title: YTP - thechairman45 Dances On The Sidewalk
description:
Thechairman45 is truly a class act. I'm glad to see a popular, talented YTPer who still cares about his fans. So, as a little return gift for his Q&A session, I wanted to provide him with this. Thank you for the many great lulz, chairman! :3

DISCLAIMER: I don't own any of these clips. This video does not represent the opinions of the original creators of these clips. I am not profiting from their use in any way.
